scripts.check: biome check --formatter-enabled=true --organize-imports-enabled=true --linter-enabled=false . && biome lint . && turbo typecheck --filter=@mpad/client --filter=@mpad/server --filter=@mpad/core --filter=@mpad/protocol --filter=@mpad/testkit --filter=@mpad/text-core --filter=@mpad/tursoimport
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/client test && ./scripts/docker-test-db.sh bun run --cwd packages/server test && ./scripts/docker-test-db.sh bun run --cwd tools/tursoimport test
